- [AI Chat](/coco-app/main/docs/getting-started/AI-Chat/): AI Chat #  Coco AI is not just a search tool, but your AI intelligent center. In chat mode, you can communicate with AI in natural language, ask questions, analyze files, and summarize knowledge.
